chapter_title.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ ( عليهم السلام ) وُلَاةُ الْأَمْرِ وَ هُمُ النَّاسُ الْمَحْسُودُونَ الَّذِينَ ذَكَرَهُمُ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 16 – The Imams<sup>asws</sup> are the Masters of the Command (Wali Al-Amr), and they<sup>asws</sup> are the envied people whom Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic has Mentioned

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (411/ 2)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (411/ 2)
text: اللَّهِ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى أَمْ يَحْسُدُونَ النَّاسَ عَلى ما آتاهُمُ اللَّهُ مِنْ فَضْلِهِ قَالَ نَحْنُ الْمَحْسُودُونَ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Husayn Bin Saeed, from Muhammad Bin Al Fuzayl,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassanasws regarding the Words of Allahazwj Blessed and High [4:54] Or do they envy the people for what Allah has Given them of His Grace? Heasws said: ‘Weasws are the envied people’.
en.sarwar: 2. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Husayn ibn Sa‘id from Muhammad ibn al-Fudayl from abu al-Hassan (a.s.) who has said the following about the words of Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High, Or are they envious of the people whom Allah has granted of His bounties? ( 4:54 Holy Quran) “We are the envied ones.”
